concepts.headline: Skip the gridlock. Own the city.
concepts.subline: The lightweight, long-range electric commuter bike.
concepts.rationale: High-contrast urban visual appeals to Mission creatives; direct headline targets frustrated commuters.

concepts.headline: Sin tráfico. Sin límites. Solo muévete.
